steps.title: Spot the narrowing from general to specific
steps.content: ”Certain grains” is vague; “maize and wheat” are the particular types. The transition bridges this move from broad to narrow.

steps.title: Select the transition marking specificity
steps.content: ”In particular” means “to be more specific” and introduces concrete examples following a general reference. Alternatively, by comparison, and second of all suggest alternatives, comparisons, and list structure — none express specificity. That matches choice A — A is correct.
